creator: parv_@yahoo.com
text:
this was, on the fateful occasion around Aug 24 01:17 -0400,
sent by parv                                                         
>
> 
> >Number:         30018
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       mozilla 0.9.3 build fails
...
> 
> made following changes to the makefile...
> 
> --- Makefile--old       Fri Aug 24 00:36:47 2001
> +++ Makefile    Fri Aug 24 00:37:20 2001
> @@ -42,13 +42,13 @@
>                 --enable-crypto                 \
>                 --enable-double-buffer          \
>                 --enable-editor                 \
> -               --enable-mailnews               \
> +               --disable-mailnews              \
>                 --enable-mathml                 \
>                 --enable-optimize="${CFLAGS}"   \
>                 --enable-pics                   \
>                 --enable-svg                    \
>                 --enable-tests                  \
> -               --enable-toolkit=gtk            \
> +               --enable-toolkit=xlib           \
>                 --enable-x11-shm                \
>                 --enable-chrome-format=jar      \
>                 --with-jpeg=${LOCALBASE}        \
> 
> 
> >Description:
> 
> mozilla (and mozilla+ipv6) build fails w/ this message:
> 
[ message deleted ]

on further analysis, trial-and-error actually, make build fails
when toolkit option is changed to "xlib" from "gtk" and rest of the 
"configure-args" is left as is. (i have tried after cvsup around 8pm 
edt, sep 7 2001.)
